title: MoreDisc
description: Transform your jukebox into a real playlist with MoreDisc!
body:
# 🎵 MoreDisc – More Music in Minecraft! 🎵

Do you think there aren't enough discs in Minecraft?

**MoreDisc** is here to change that!

⚠️ **The mod is currently in BETA**: there are still few songs, but it will be updated regularly with new discs!

🎶 **For now, you can find:**
- ✨ A Christmas song by **Mariah Carey**
- ✨ The famous “For Sure” by **Emmanuel Macron**
- ✨ House music
- ✨ A variety of music – a little bit of everything to set the mood

Whether you want to chill in your base, have a party with friends, or just enjoy some stylish background music, **MoreDisc** adds a real musical touch to your adventure.

### 📢 **Do you have any song suggestions?**
Send us your suggestions on our Discord server!

To suggest a song, please provide:
- 🎵 The song title
- 👤 The artist's name (if possible – not required for memes)
- 📁 The audio file in .ogg format OR at least a YouTube link

We're counting on you to help us develop the mod! 💿🔥
